title: Tetan shock trooper
content:
{{Top|leg}}
[[File:Krath_Shocktroop.jpg|thumb|right|250px|Tetan Shock Trooper]]
'''Tetan shock trooper''' was the name used to identify the elite warriors of the [[Krath/Legends|Krath]] cult. They were subtly manipulated by the [[Krath/Legends|Tetan Elite]] [[Aleema Keto|Aleema]] and [[Satal Keto/Legends|Satal Keto]], and were used to subdue the loyalist forces of the [[Empress Teta system/Legends|Empress Teta system]] during their coup. They wore ceremonial armor into battle and were completely loyal to their masters. Their primary weapon was a [[Spear/Legends|war spear]] with a [[Blaster pistol/Legends|Blaster pistol]] as a sidearm.

Some of these warriors would be further brainwashed to become [[Chaos trooper]]s who served as pilots.

==Appearances==
*[[Tales of the Jedi – Dark Lords of the Sith 2|''Tales of the Jedi – Dark Lords of the Sith'' 2]]
